title: Product Intelligence Domain Responsibility
purpose: Document the established Product Intelligence responsibility without inventing ownership.
scope:
- Owns: product interpretation.
- Consumes: verified source packs.
- Build Tree: Product Intelligence.
responsibilities:
- Maintain product interpretation.
- Expose bounded read models.
- Preserve source provenance.
authority:
- ADR-005 establishes the bounded domain.
- ADR-020 controls architecture baseline.
boundaries:
- Does not own policy truth.
- May not execute human decisions.
- May not invent product recommendations.
dependencies:
- Product source packs.
- Rule and effective-period context.
- Evidence envelopes.
source_of_truth:
- Domain owner: Product Intelligence.
- Canonical definition source: ADR-005.
related_documents:
- Product catalog contract.
- Product source-pack contract.
- Master Build Tree.
constitutional_references:
- Article 0 / Ley Zero.
- Articles I, III–VII.
traceability:
- Template: Canonical Domain Responsibility Scaffold.
- Gate: SG-002 allowlisted domain instance.
